description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa upholstered in a dark gray material, likely faux leather or leatherette, with a plush and cushioned appearance. The sofa features three distinct, generously padded backrest sections and three matching seat cushions, all of which are attached and uniformly sized. The armrests are wide, rounded, and heavily padded, providing substantial comfort and support on both ends. The back of the sofa is fully upholstered and segmented into three vertical panels, mirroring the seat and backrest divisions. The overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or covered patios. The sofa sits low to the ground, with its legs either recessed or hidden from view, giving it a solid and grounded presence.
description: A modern, dark gray three-seater sofa with plush, segmented cushions and wide, padded armrests. The upholstery is smooth and uniform, giving it a contemporary and comfortable look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three padded backrests, three seat cushions, and wide, rounded armrests on both sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, thick armrest, and the profile of the backrest and seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully upholstered back with three vertical segments and no visible legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest, cushion thickness, and overall sofa depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniformly sized seat cushions and three matching attached backrest cushions, all segmented and plush.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, rounded, and heavily padded armrests at both ends, extending slightly above seat height with a smooth, continuous profile.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, likely recessed or hidden, giving the sofa a grounded and solid appearance with no exposed features.
attribute_backrest_type: High, segmented backrest with three distinct, attached cushions, each matching the width of the seat cushions and providing full back support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and subtle seam lines outlining the cushion segments.
